pisti.h1: Ski runs in Pamporovo — 37+ km of pistes
pisti.seoTitle: Pamporovo ski runs 2026 | 37+ km, night skiing, map — Pamporovo Villa
pisti.seoDescription: All ski runs in Pamporovo: length, difficulty, night skiing on Stenata, lifts to Snezhanka. Plan your ski holiday — villas from €110/night.
pisti.seoKeywords: Pamporovo ski runs, Pamporovo pistes, Stenata, night skiing, Snezhanka, ski map Bulgaria

sections.heading: The ski area at a glance
paragraphs: Pamporovo is Bulgaria's oldest ski resort (since 1933) and one of the sunniest — over 120 clear-sky days each winter. The resort sits at 1,650 m; the highest marked run reaches Snezhanka at 1,926 m.
Marked pistes total more than 37 km. Around 90% have snowmaking, which stabilises the season even in mild weather.
bullets: 15+ main runs plus bypasses and fun park
Green, blue, red, and black trails

sections.heading: Iconic runs
paragraphs: Run #2 Stenata (1,258 m, black) is the resort symbol — World Cup races and the only run with regular night skiing. #3 Architect Petar Petrov (1,766 m) is the longest black run.
For families and beginners, #6 Tourist Run (3,343 m) offers a long gentle descent. #5 Malina (2,799 m) is the longest red — from the summit to Malina ski centre.

sections.heading: Where to stay after the slopes
paragraphs: Pamporovo Villa offers 3 private chalets 2 km from the centre — fireplace, BBQ, up to 6 guests per villa. Ideal if you want quiet away from hotel noise and your own kitchen after a day on the snow.

pisti.intro: Complete overview of the Pamporovo ski area: 15+ runs from green beginner slopes to black-diamond Stenata, night skiing, and lifts to Snezhanka peak (1,926 m).

kude-da-spim.seoTitle: Where to stay in Pamporovo | Villas, hotels, tips 2026
kude-da-spim.seoDescription: Where to sleep in Pamporovo: hotel vs villa, Raykovski Livadi, from €110/night for a whole villa up to 6 guests. Official rental — Pamporovo Villa.
kude-da-spim.seoKeywords: where to stay Pamporovo, Pamporovo accommodation, villa Pamporovo, hotel Pamporovo

sections.heading: Areas to stay in the resort
paragraphs: Pamporovo centre is handy for restaurants and lifts but can be noisy in peak season. Malina, Stoykite, and Raykovski Livadi offer more peace and parking.
Raykovski Livadi is 2 km from the centre — close enough for the slopes, far enough for quiet nights under the stars.

sections.heading: What suits whom
paragraphs: Couples on a weekend — hotel or small villa. Family with children — a villa with kitchen and fireplace is often better value than two hotel rooms. Group of 4–6 — a whole villa gives you a shared living room and BBQ without sharing with strangers.
bullets: Hotel: half board, no cooking, central location
Villa: whole house, fireplace, BBQ, parking, more privacy
Pamporovo Villa: 3 villas, 2 bedrooms, up to 6 guests, from €110/night

sections.heading: Our recommendation: Pamporovo Villa
paragraphs: Three matching-style villas (Villa 1, Villa 2, Villa Deluxe) at one address — you book only one villa for your group. Each has 2 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, fireplace, and BBQ terrace.

kude-da-spim.intro: Compare accommodation in the resort — central hotels, apartments, and private villas. A practical guide for families, groups, and couples.

hotel-vs-vila.h1: Hotel or villa in Pamporovo — which to choose?
hotel-vs-vila.seoTitle: Hotel or villa Pamporovo | Comparison for ski & summer 2026
hotel-vs-vila.seoDescription: Hotel vs villa in Pamporovo: prices, advantages for families and groups, fireplace and BBQ. When villas win — Pamporovo Villa from €110/night.
hotel-vs-vila.seoKeywords: hotel or villa Pamporovo, accommodation comparison, villa vs hotel Bulgaria

sections.heading: When a hotel is the better choice
paragraphs: Short stay (1–2 nights), you want breakfast and dinner without cooking, or you are solo/a couple without needing extra space. Central hotels are minutes from the lifts.

sections.heading: When a villa wins
paragraphs: With 4–6 guests, per-person cost in a private villa often beats a 3-star hotel with half board. You get a living room with fireplace, kitchen, BBQ, and parking — no neighbours in the corridor.
Families with young children appreciate fixed routines — sleep, cooking, afternoon naps without lifts and reception queues.
bullets: Fireplace and BBQ — atmosphere hotels cannot match
Parking at the door — easy with ski gear
Pamporovo Villa: from €110/night for up to 6 people

sections.heading: Sample Invoice
paragraphs: A villa at 150 € per night for 5 nights = 750 € total. For 5 people, that’s 150 € per person for 5 nights (30 € per night per person)—often less than a hotel plus meals at the resort.

hotel-vs-vila.intro: An honest comparison: price per person, comfort, cooking, fireplace, parking, and which option makes sense for which trip.

sections.heading: What “rent a villa” means
paragraphs: At Pamporovo Villa you rent the entire house — not a room in a shared building. The villa is for your group only: keys, living room, kitchen, BBQ terrace, and parking are yours.

sections.heading: The three villas
paragraphs: Villa 1, Villa 2, and Villa Deluxe have the same capacity and amenities — 2 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, fireplace, full kitchen, Wi‑Fi. Choice depends on calendar availability.

sections.heading: Prices and Reservations
paragraphs: The summer season starts at 110 € per night for the entire villa. Winter rates are higher, depending on the time of year. Book online at pamporovovilla.com or on the /rent page.

naem-vila.intro: How whole-villa rental works in Pamporovo — what's included, prices, booking, and the three chalets on Raykovski Livadi.

sections.heading: BBQ terrace
paragraphs: In summer and mild winter days the terrace BBQ is perfect for family evenings. Combine with local products from Smolyan or the resort.

paragraphs: The hosts provide the firewood for the fireplace. If you’re booking in January–February, be sure to book early—the cottages with fireplaces are among the first to fill up.

vila-s-kamina.intro: Winter atmosphere after the slopes — all three Pamporovo Villa chalets have a wood fireplace in the living room plus a BBQ terrace for sunny days.

sections.heading: Why a villa for ski season
paragraphs: Ski gear, wet clothes, early starts — a private villa gives space to dry kit, cook, and breakfast without restaurant hours. Parking is at the door.

sections.heading: Close to the pistes
paragraphs: Raykovski Livadi is 2 km from the centre — 5–7 minutes by car to the lifts. After night skiing on Stenata you are quickly back at the fireplace.

sections.heading: When to Book
paragraphs: Christmas, New Year’s, and the February break are the first to fill up. A minimum stay of 3–5 nights during peak season—check the calendar online.

naem-zima.intro: Plan a ski holiday in Pamporovo — rent a whole villa near the runs, with fireplace, parking, and prices for families and groups.

sections.heading: Why Pamporovo in summer
paragraphs: At 1,650 m the air stays fresh even when the lowlands are hot. The region offers dozens of marked routes, caves, and authentic villages within an hour's drive.
Renting a villa with BBQ terrace and kitchen makes summer more economical than a hotel — especially for families.

lato.intro: Pamporovo is not only a ski resort — summer here means eco routes, waterfalls, caves, and family holidays at 1,650 m with clean air.

sections.heading: Ski season
paragraphs: Season is usually December–March/April. 90% of runs have snowmaking — skiing is reliable even in warm spells.
Combine a day on the pistes with an evening by the fireplace in a private villa — without hotel lobby noise.

zima.intro: 37+ km of pistes, night skiing, snowmaking, and 120+ sunny days — winter in Pamporovo is among the best in Bulgaria.

yagodinska-pechtera.seoKeywords: Yagodinska Cave, caves Pamporovo, Buynovo Gorge, Rhodope caves

sections.heading: Practical tips
paragraphs: Cave temperature is about 6°C — bring a jacket even in summer. Book tours in peak season.
Combine with Buynovo Gorge and lunch in the region — a full day out of the resort.

yagodinska-pechtera.intro: Bulgaria's third-longest cave — 10.5 km of galleries, cave pearls, and the New Year Hall. ~50 km from Pamporovo — ideal day trip.

shiroka-laka.intro: 16 km from Pamporovo — Revival houses, the bagpipe school, and the annual kukeri festival. A must-see in the Rhodopes.

sections.heading: Lift tips
paragraphs: The longest lift is Stoykite to Snezhanka — 2,992 m, 2,400/h capacity. Studenets gets busy in the morning — start from Malina if you are staying south.
After a day on the slopes—a cottage with a fireplace just 2 km away, with no lines at the front desk.

liftove.intro: Six lifts connect the resort to Snezhanka peak (1,926 m). Combined capacity over 13,000 skiers per hour — plan your day on the mountain.

nochno-karane.h1: Night skiing in Pamporovo — Stenata run
nochno-karane.seoDescription: Night skiing on Stenata Pamporovo — schedule, ski pass, villa 2 km away — Pamporovo Villa.
nochno-karane.seoKeywords: night skiing Pamporovo, Stenata night, Pamporovo evening ski

sections.heading: After the slopes
paragraphs: Dinner at the villa fireplace — 2 km from the resort, no hotel noise after night skiing.

nochno-karane.intro: The only lit run for night skiing — usually 17:30–22:00 in season. The resort icon under floodlights.

stenata.h1: Stenata run — black piste and night skiing
stenata.seoTitle: Stenata Pamporovo | Black run, night skiing
stenata.seoDescription: Stenata run Pamporovo — 1,258 m, black, night skiing. Villa 2 km — Pamporovo Villa.
stenata.seoKeywords: Stenata Pamporovo, black run Bulgaria, night skiing

sections.heading: Who it is for
paragraphs: Advanced skiers only — beginners should use green and blue runs on /pamporovo/pisti.

stenata.intro: 1,258 m black run — World Cup host and one of Bulgaria's most photogenic descents. Regular night skiing.

vruh-snezhanka.h1: Snezhanka peak — 1,926 m, highest point on the runs
vruh-snezhanka.seoTitle: Snezhanka peak Pamporovo | 1,926 m, lift, panorama
vruh-snezhanka.seoDescription: Snezhanka peak Pamporovo — 1,926 m, Stoykite lift, black runs. Villa rental — Pamporovo Villa.
vruh-snezhanka.seoKeywords: Snezhanka peak, Pamporovo summit, ski zone Bulgaria

sections.heading: Tip
paragraphs: At sunrise the area is quieter — coffee at the top and descent via Malina.

vruh-snezhanka.intro: The highest point of the ski area — 1,926 m, panorama over the Rhodopes and lifts from all directions.

ski-karti.h1: Ski passes and lifts in Pamporovo — practical guide
ski-karti.seoTitle: Ski pass Pamporovo 2026 | Prices, where to buy
ski-karti.seoDescription: Pamporovo ski pass — where to buy, day and season passes, lifts. Villa base — Pamporovo Villa.
ski-karti.seoKeywords: Pamporovo ski pass, lift ticket, ski card Bulgaria

sections.heading: Save money
paragraphs: Renting a whole villa with kitchen reduces accommodation cost — more budget for skiing and restaurants.

ski-karti.intro: Lift passes sold at Studenets and Malina. Check pamporovo.me for current prices and season cards.

bunovsko-zhdrelo.h1: Buynovo Gorge — on the way to Yagodinska Cave
bunovsko-zhdrelo.seoTitle: Buynovo Gorge from Pamporovo | Yagodinska Cave
bunovsko-zhdrelo.seoDescription: Buynovo Gorge from Pamporovo — 50 km, Yagodinska Cave, eco tour. Villa rental — Pamporovo Villa.
bunovsko-zhdrelo.seoKeywords: Buynovo Gorge, Yagodinska Cave, Rhodope gorges

sections.heading: Day plan
paragraphs: Yagodinska Cave + Buynovo Gorge + return to the villa for dinner.

bunovsko-zhdrelo.intro: Dramatic gorge on the road to Yagodinska Cave — combine with the cave tour and lunch in the region.

chepelare.h1: Chepelare and Pamporovo — two resorts, one region
chepelare.seoTitle: Chepelare vs Pamporovo | Ski, distance, accommodation
chepelare.seoDescription: Chepelare and Pamporovo — resort comparison. Villa rental in Pamporovo from €110 — Pamporovo Villa.

sections.heading: Where to stay
paragraphs: Both resorts have hotels — but for a group up to 6 a whole villa on Raykovski Livadi is often more comfortable and economical.

chepelare.intro: Chepelare is 10 km away — smaller ski area, Mechi Chal, quieter resort. Compare with Pamporovo for your stay.
